package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for dto_to_model_mapping_in_handler: Handlers that own transport-to-model mapping instead of dedicated mappers or services.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule029NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule029NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule029NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario029Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule029NegativeService, input Rule029NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
